| [benchmark.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/benchmark.py "benchmark.py") | [benchmark.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/benchmark.py "benchmark.py") | [feat(cli): add benchmark comparison to backtest output](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/8360dc7cda28df53f0bc1ac752fb24d6ae341a34 "feat(cli): add benchmark comparison to backtest output  Adds benchmark.py with yfinance-backed ticker resolution (SPY, CSI 300, etc.), injects external benchmark via config['benchmark'] in engines/base.py, and renders a benchmark panel (ticker / benchmark return / excess return / information ratio) in cli.py.  Closes #48") | 3 months agoApr 27, 2026 |
| [correlation.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/correlation.py "correlation.py") | [correlation.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/correlation.py "correlation.py") | [fix(correlation): resolve bare tickers so the matrix stops failing wi…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/89d773edc8b5080cf457a445b57dc7cafaac46e6 "fix(correlation): resolve bare tickers so the matrix stops failing with \"Fetched: []\"  The /correlation endpoint passed user input straight to the data loaders, which key US/HK/A-share instruments by exchange-suffixed symbols (AAPL.US / 0700.HK / 600000.SH). Bare tickers — exactly what the UI hint suggests (e.g. \"BTC-USDT,ETH-USDT,AAPL,SPY\") — matched no loader and the request failed with \"Could not fetch price data for at least 2 assets. Fetched: []\".  Three layered fixes:  1. infer_market: classify by explicit suffix first, then bare numeric    codes by digit length (6 digits = A-share, <=5 = HK). The old prefix    heuristics misrouted bare HK codes (0700 -> SZ, 9988 -> US), ChiNext    codes (300750 -> HK), and even suffixed 830799.BJ (-> US). 2. _normalize_symbol (new): canonicalize bare tickers to the loader    symbol form before fetching, keeping the user's input as the label. 3. Fetch loop: walk the market's full FALLBACK_CHAIN until a loader    actually returns data instead of stopping at the first *available*    one, and log every per-source failure instead of the bare    \"except: continue\" that made this failure mode undiagnosable.  Tests: +10 cases (bare/suffixed classification, symbol normalization, chain fall-through); 22 pass.  Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>") | 4 days agoJul 11, 2026 |
| [metrics.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/metrics.py "metrics.py") | [metrics.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/metrics.py "metrics.py") | [fix(backtest): keep Sharpe and information ratio finite for single-ba…](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/b708540e4b3ec57a52b6be054bce226f5d036561 "fix(backtest): keep Sharpe and information ratio finite for single-bar runs  Series.std() uses ddof=1, so a single-observation return series (a one-bar backtest, e.g. start_date == end_date) returns NaN. vol (Sharpe) and active_std (information ratio) consumed it unguarded and produced NaN, while downside_std (Sortino) was already guarded with the same pattern. Apply the len > 1 guard to vol and active_std so all three risk metrics stay finite; a one-bar run now reports 0.0 instead of NaN.  Signed-off-by: Santh <64453045+santhreal@users.noreply.github.com>") | 16 hours agoJul 14, 2026 |
| [models.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/models.py "models.py") | [models.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/models.py "models.py") | [feat: multi-market backtest engines with per-market rules](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/d457cf4a5bf444b7a95a5e3f9ded0a3f2f6a1e3c "feat: multi-market backtest engines with per-market rules  Replace single vectorised daily_portfolio engine with bar-by-bar engines that enforce real market rules: - ChinaAEngine: T+1, no shorting, price limits, 100-lot, stamp tax - CryptoEngine: 24/7, funding fees, liquidation, maker/taker, leverage - GlobalEquityEngine: US zero-commission + fractional / HK stamp tax + lots  New shared foundation: models.py (Position/TradeRecord/EquitySnapshot), metrics.py (extracted from daily_portfolio), base.py (BaseEngine ABC). Runner routes by source to the correct engine automatically.") | 3 months agoApr 8, 2026 |
| [run\_card.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/run_card.py "run_card.py") | [run\_card.py](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/blob/main/agent/backtest/run_card.py "run_card.py") | [revert: back out IRR-AGL reliability/governance stack (](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/310183b0af3bd9d9a6653672a714524df02752f4 "revert: back out IRR-AGL reliability/governance stack (#405, #416)  Reverts merge commits a2f8062 (#405) and af893c1 (#416), and removes the now-orphaned #406 artifact metadata store (src/reliability + tests, zero references left outside its own tests).  Why: the stack wrapped the tool registry in every session path (even governance mode=off) without exposing the registry surface AgentContext reads, breaking all session-runtime chats within a day (#433, #431). It also modified protected core files (src/agent/loop.py, src/session/ service.py), shipped 12 internal-convention docs/ files into the public tree, and its enforcement layer already has reported bypass paths (#420). Trading safety stays on the single mandate-gate design (#31, #144).  README news entries for 2026-07-07/07-06 updated accordingly.") [#405](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/pull/405) [,](https://github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading/commit/310183b0af3bd9d9a6653672a714524df02752f4 "revert: back out IRR-AGL reliability/governance stack (#405, #416)  Reverts merge commits a2f8062 (#405) and af893c1 (#416), and removes the now-orphaned #406 artifact metadata store (src/reliability + tests, zero references left outside its own tests).  Why: the stack wrapped the tool registry in every session path (even governance mode=off) without exposing the registry surface AgentContext reads, breaking all session-runtime chats within a day (#433, #431). It also modified protected core files (src/agent/loop.py, src/session/ service.py), shipped 12 internal-convention docs/ files into the public tree, and its enforcement layer already has reported bypass paths (#420). Trading safety stays on the single mandate-gate design (#31, #144).  README news entries for 2026-07-07/07-06 updated accordingly.") Why: the stack wrapped the tool registry in every session path (even governance mode=off) without exposing the registry surface AgentContext reads, breaking all session-runtime chats within a day (#433, #431). It also modified protected core files (src/agent/loop.py, src/session/ service.py), shipped 12 internal-convention docs/ files into the public tree, and its enforcement layer already has reported bypass paths (#420).
